---
title: "Elastic Net"
author: "Erica"
date: "2026-03-11"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE
)
```   


```{r}
#load library
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(lubridate)
library(glmnet)
library(ggplot2)
library(lmtest)
```


```{r}
#read in data
file_path = "../data/df_for_shap_analysis.csv"
df = read.csv(file_path) 
```

## enet function to be copied to replace the code block in eval
```{r}
#enet
predict_alpha_enet <- function(train_df){
  df <- train_df %>%
    mutate(
      caldt = as.Date(caldt),
      year = year(caldt)
    ) %>%
    arrange(year, crsp_fundno) %>%
    drop_na()

  evaluation_year <- max(df$year)

  train_full <- df %>%
    filter(year < evaluation_year)

  test_data <- df %>%
    filter(year == evaluation_year)

  if(nrow(test_data) == 0) return(NULL)

  feature_names <- train_full %>%
    select(-alpha_ann, -crsp_fundno, -caldt, -year) %>%
    colnames()

  tune_years <- sort(unique(train_full$year))

  split_index <- floor(0.7 * length(tune_years))

  train_years <- tune_years[1:split_index]
  valid_years <- tune_years[(split_index + 1):length(tune_years)]

  train_tune <- train_full %>%
    filter(year %in% train_years)

  valid_tune <- train_full %>%
    filter(year %in% valid_years)

  X_train <- train_tune %>%
    select(all_of(feature_names)) %>%
    as.matrix()

  y_train <- train_tune$alpha_ann

  X_valid <- valid_tune %>%
    select(all_of(feature_names)) %>%
    as.matrix()

  y_valid <- valid_tune$alpha_ann

  alphas <- seq(0, 1, by = 0.1)

  best_mse <- Inf
  best_alpha <- NULL
  best_lambda <- NULL

  for (a in alphas){

    model <- glmnet(
      X_train,
      y_train,
      alpha = a
    )

    lambdas <- model$lambda

    for (l in lambdas){

      preds <- predict(model, newx = X_valid, s = l)
      mse <- mean((y_valid - preds)^2)

      if (mse < best_mse){
        best_mse <- mse
        best_alpha <- a
        best_lambda <- l
      }
    }
  }

  X_full <- train_full %>%
    select(all_of(feature_names)) %>%
    as.matrix()

  y_full <- train_full$alpha_ann

  enet_model <- glmnet(
    X_full,
    y_full,
    alpha = best_alpha,
    lambda = best_lambda
  )

  X_test <- test_data %>%
    select(all_of(feature_names)) %>%
    as.matrix()

  pred_enet <- predict(enet_model, newx = X_test)

  result <- test_data %>%
  transmute(
    evaluation_year = year,
    crsp_fundno = crsp_fundno,
    predicted_alpha = as.numeric(pred_enet)
  )

  result <- result %>%
    mutate(
      alpha = best_alpha,
      lambda = best_lambda,
      mse = best_mse
    )

  return(result)
}
```

## feature importance for enet
```{r}
## feature importance for enet

run_enet_expanding <- function(df,
                               test_start_year = 2025,
                               test_end_year = 2025){

  df <- df %>%
    mutate(
      caldt = as.Date(caldt),
      year = lubridate::year(caldt)
    ) %>%
    arrange(caldt) %>%
    drop_na()

  feature_names <- df %>%
    select(-alpha_ann, -crsp_fundno, -caldt, -year) %>%
    colnames()

  train_df <- df %>%
    filter(year <= test_end_year)

  model_output <- predict_alpha_enet(train_df)

  if (is.null(model_output)) return(NULL)

  all_predictions <- model_output %>%
    arrange(evaluation_year, crsp_fundno)

  all_params <- model_output %>%
    distinct(evaluation_year, alpha, lambda, mse) %>%
    arrange(evaluation_year)

  return(list(
    all_predictions = all_predictions,
    all_params = all_params,
    feature_names = feature_names   # pass out
  ))
}

results <- run_enet_expanding(df)

all_predictions <- results$all_predictions
all_params <- results$all_params
feature_names <- results$feature_names

# best params
best_global <- all_params %>%
  arrange(mse) %>%
  slice(1)

best_alpha  <- best_global$alpha
best_lambda <- best_global$lambda

# final training
train_final <- df %>%
  mutate(year = lubridate::year(caldt)) %>%
  filter(year <= 2024)

X_final <- train_final %>% select(all_of(feature_names)) %>% as.matrix()
y_final <- train_final$alpha_ann

final_model <- glmnet(
  X_final,
  y_final,
  alpha = best_alpha,
  lambda = best_lambda
)

# -----------------------
# SHAP (correct version)
# -----------------------

coef_vec <- as.matrix(coef(final_model))[-1, , drop = FALSE]
beta <- as.numeric(coef_vec)

mu <- colMeans(X_final)

# SHAP = beta * (x - mean)
shap_values <- sweep(X_final, 2, mu, "-") %>%
  sweep(2, beta, "*") %>%
  as.data.frame()

abs_shap <- abs(shap_values)

importance <- colMeans(abs_shap) %>%
  sort(decreasing = TRUE)

imp_df <- tibble(
  feature = names(importance),
  value = importance
)

enet_featimp_ranking <- 
  ggplot(imp_df,
         aes(y = reorder(feature, value),
             x = value,
             fill = value)) +
  geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "firebrick", high = "dodgerblue4") +
  labs(
    title = "Elastic Net SHAP Ranking",
    y = "",
    x = "Mean (|SHAP|)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

enet_featimp_ranking

#ggsave("../figures/enet_shap_plot.png", width = 16, height = 12)
```
